author: jaffar21
install_msg:
Thanks for installing **MediaCaption**!

Quick start:
• `[p]media caption your text here` (reply to or attach an image / GIF / video)
• `[p]media meme top text | bottom text`
• `[p]media speechbubble`, `[p]media deepfry`, `[p]media jpeg`, `[p]media invert`, `[p]media grayscale`, `[p]media blur`, `[p]media pixelate`, `[p]media rotate`, `[p]media flip`, `[p]media flop`, `[p]media reverse`, `[p]media speed`, `[p]media togif`, `[p]media tomp4`, `[p]media info`

`ffmpeg` is bundled automatically (via `imageio-ffmpeg`) — no extra setup needed.
Run `[p]help media` for the full list.
name: MediaCaption
short: Caption and edit images, GIFs, and videos right inside Discord.
description: Adds a `[p]media` command group that captions, memes, deepfries, blurs, pixelates, reverses, speed-shifts, and converts media. Works on attachments, replies, message links and history. Image / GIF features run on Pillow; video features use a bundled static `ffmpeg` (via `imageio-ffmpeg`) so no system install is required.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any end user data. Media submitted to commands is processed in memory (and briefly written to a temp directory for video operations) and discarded as soon as the result is sent.
